package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for init_registers_routes_or_dependencies: `init()` functions that register handlers, routes, or runtime dependencies.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule077NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule077NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule077NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario077Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule077NegativeService, input Rule077NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
